reason: This is a general life advice tweet in Arabic saying 'Be blind to what you don't like, deaf to what hurts you, and numb to what pains you - this is how to live happily.' Contains no ISIS-related content or extremist messaging.
original_post: كُن آعمى لكل شيء لايعجبك وكُن آصم لكل شيء يجرحك وكُن متبلد لكل شيء يؤلمك هكذا تعيش سعيد..♡♡
